result:
## What it does

A small order-processing utility module: computes item totals, applies discount codes, computes average item price, and formats an order receipt as text.

## Bugs

1. **`calcTotal` — off-by-one / out-of-bounds read (line 5)**: `i <= items.length` loops one past the end, so `items[items.length]` is `undefined`, and `undefined.price` throws a `TypeError`. Should be `i < items.length`.

2. **`averageItemPrice` — divide by zero (line 20)**: if `items` is empty, `calcTotal` returns `0` (once bug #1 is fixed) and `0 / 0` yields `NaN`, not an error but a silent bad value. Worth guarding explicitly if empty arrays are a valid input.

3. **`applyDiscount` — silent no-op on invalid code (line 13-14)**: an unrecognized `code` just returns the original total with no warning/error, which may be intended but could hide typos in discount codes upstream.

The main functional bug is #1 — it will crash on every non-empty call to `calcTotal` (and transitively `averageItemPrice` and `formatOrder`).
